/CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/X: PAROLE REPRESENTATIVE CHARLES BROWN NOT APPEARING/3000ADM/X: ADMITED VIOLATION PREVIOUSLY ON 5-27-21 FOR HAMMER CONDITION/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO BE GIVEN INCLUSIVE CREDITS FOR 3 COUNTIES/DEF: GIVEN CREDITS FOR SAN FRANCISCO, SACRAMENTO & YOLO COUNTIES/  /3000REIN/PAJ: 180 DAYS/CTORD: THERE IS NO TIME LOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS VIOLATION/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 93 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X:IN LIGHT OF THE ADMISSION: ORAL MOTION BY THE PEOPLE TO WITHDRAW  AND DISMISS THE PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE/MO GRTD/X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TOPAROLE AGEN IN WOODLAND, CA,UPON   RELEASEAND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BYTHE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT AND STATUS OF TREATMENT/NP/X: PAROLE AGENT ROBERT ABAKAN  APPEARING,/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO08-03-21/X:NO BAIL/

/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT AND CASE STATUS/DAWT/X: PAROLE AGENT VINCENT GO  APPEARING/X:PAROLEE REMAINS IN TREATMENT IN MARYSVILLE, CA,/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT AND STATUS OF TREATMENT/X:AGENT WHITE ORDERED PRESENT ON 07-20-21 AT10:00 AM/

/CAL: RECALL OF BENCH WARRANT AND CASE STATUS/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/BWR: 6-22-21 /BWR1/X: ON 6-22-21 A BENCH WARRANT WAS ISSUED BECAUSE IT WAS INDICATED TO   THECOURT THAT DEFENDANT HAD LEFT THE JERICHO PROGRAM,   HOWEVER, IT   HAS NOW BEEN VERIFIED BY DEFENDANT'S AGENT OF RECORD,   PAROLE AGENT   JOSEPH WHITETHAT DEFENDANT IS ACTUALLY IN THE PATHWAYSPROGRAM   AND IN STILL CURRENTLY THERE/X: PAROLE CASE STATUS AND PROGRESS REPORT NEXT DATE/X: OR STATUS RETURNED;  COLLABORATIVE COURT ORDER SIGNED ON 5-27-21;   TO ENTER RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM/OR/DOPU: IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT/

/CAL: PAROLE PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/DEF: ADMITS VIOLATION #4 TODAY & SENTENCING ON VIOLATION DEFERRED/X: VIOLATION #4 CONDITION IS SUBSTANCE ABUSE OF METHAMPHETAMINE/ /X: SENTENCINGIS DEFERRED 6 MONTHS/X: IF FAILS AT JERICHO PROGRAM; A 180 DAY HAMMER WILLBE IMPOSED AT     THAT TIME; IF COMPLETES PROGRAM THERE WILL BE NO HAMMERAND    DISMISSAL OF PETITION WILL BE ISSUED BT DISTRICT ATTORNEY / /X: RELEASE TO ENTER COLLABORATIVE COURT PROGRAM JERICHO PROGRAM IN   BRISBANE, CA,/CTORD: RELEASE ONLY RELEASED TO REPRESENTATIVE FROM JERICHO PROGRAM/X: FELONY #21004551 IS PENDING; IF DEFENDANT PLEADS IN #21004551, THE DISTRICTATTORNEY WILL DISMISS THE PAROLE REVOCATION PETITION IN THIS CASE/X: HOUSING PENDING BED AVAILABILITY/ /X: ALL PARTIES STIPULATE THAT TODAY'S ADMISSION WILL NOT BE USED     AGAINST DEFENDANT IN ANY OTHER CRIMINAL CASES/X: RELEASE ORDER SIGNED/OR/DAWF/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TOTHE ALLEGATIONS/X: BAIL IS SET ON PAROLE ARRAIGNMENT/NB/ /X: PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/X: TIME IS WAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/X: ORAL MOTION BY DEFENSE FOR OR RELEASE/MO DENIED/X: PAROLE AGENT OF RECORD;AGENT BRADY MUST APPEAR IN PERSON/CONTD: PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/DOP/
